creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry for the delayed follow up.  The patch works for me.  iichid_gpio appears to work as well.  One unrelated problem is that I can't seem to trigger a right button down event.  Clicking anywhere on the touchpad results in a left click, as does a two finger click.  I see 

event 9  - PIXA3854:01 093A:0274 TouchPad: kernel bug: clickpad with right button, assuming it is not a clickpad

in Xorg.log, not sure yet if that's relevant.
